name: Kray Foresight
description:
Kray Foresight is a character from the Promare Movie (2019). The administrator of the Independent Republic of Promepolis (IRP) and chief director of the Foresight Foundation (FF). He used to research fireproof building materials, but soon developed an instant-freeze bullet that can put out a Burnish fire. Galo looks up to him as a result of being pulled from a fire by Kray when he was young.

If anyone of you haven't watched the movie yet, or are only halfway, Kray is the main antagonist of the film...
creator: JJuna
